case_title: JUDY LIZARDO VS. DAVID CHRISTOPHER NIELSEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIZARDO, JUDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
LETTER REQUEST FROM DEFENDANT ASKING THE COURT TO ALLOW A REPRESENTATIVE TO APPEAR ON HIS BEHALF. ALSO, REQUESTING TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER
ORDER TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE "GRANTED"' PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,179.51 FILED BY LIZARDO, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIZARDO, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, DAVID CHRISTOPHER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
